feed.title: Engineer's Notes
feed.subtitle: A minimal, responsive, and powerful Jekyll theme for presenting professional writing.

entry.title: Update GPG key by changing email address

link.title: Update GPG key by changing email address

entry.summary: Describes step that are required when you need to modify existing GPG key (add/remove email, additional information) List GPG keys gpg --list-secret-keys --keyid-format=long [keyboxd] --------- sec xxxx/xxx1 2023-05-14 [SC] [діє до: 2025-05-13] xxxx uid [безмежна] github_1 <xxxx.xx1@gmail.com> ssb xxxx/xxxx2 2023-05-14 [E] [діє до: 2025-05-13] sec ed25519/...

entry.title: Integrating your own cli tool into aws cli

link.title: Integrating your own cli tool into aws cli

entry.summary: We are using AWS Command Line Interface (CLI) in multiple projects and daily operations. The aws cli is a propriatary tool for managing AWS services and resources from the command line. It is maintained as a dedicated application written on Python https://github.com/aws/aws-cli with its own SDLC and build system. Besides standard functionality aws cli it has the ability to integrate custom com...

entry.title: Using multiple ssh keys in different git projects and accounts

link.title: Using multiple ssh keys in different git projects and accounts

entry.summary: SSH besides standard configuration where we define what host uses which key and user can have advanced features. Let’s check the feature that allows to specify different ssh keys for the same host (github.com) but for different projects and users. Generate SSH keys add them to you local machine and to remote git server This is standard flow, check this post for full details: Sign git commit...

entry.title: AWS Graviton ARM-64 vs Amazon X86-64 GRAND PRIX 2024. Round1: CPU Benchmark.

link.title: AWS Graviton ARM-64 vs Amazon X86-64 GRAND PRIX 2024. Round1: CPU Benchmark.

entry.summary: Abstract This is a first post in series of AWS Graviton ARM-64 vs Amazon X86-64 GRAND PRIX 2024 where we will check different performance factors of Graviton, compare to classic x86. I will use own benchmarking tool assembled as docker image that is bootstrapped to both arm and x86 instances. At last Round we will deep dive into its implementation. We will run standard sysbench test to stres...

entry.title: AWS Chime SIP Trunking Integration with VoIP Asterisk

link.title: AWS Chime SIP Trunking Integration with VoIP Asterisk

entry.summary: Abstract Session Initiation Protocol (SIP) trunking is a technology used in Voice over Internet Protocol (VoIP) telephony that enables the connection of a private branch exchange (PBX) to the internet. It allows businesses to make and receive phone calls over the internet instead of traditional telephone lines. This technology allows to use standard IT infrastructure and connect globally remo...
